private.title: Private Access
private.desc: Encrypted data accessible only by you. Login on any device to copy your data instantly without messy chat histories.

public.descPart1: Perfect for campus PCs or cybercafes. Open access to specific data using a

auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.errEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.successDesc: We have sent a password reset link to your email address.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.desc: Create a new secure password for your account.
resetPassword.successDesc: You can now log in with your new password. Redirecting...
resetPassword.errDefault: The link is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
resetPassword.errConnection: Connection failed. Please check your internet.

dashboard.title: Your Secured Vault
dashboard.desc: Manage and organize your encrypted records safely.
dashboard.empty: No data found in your vault.

add.title: Add New Data
add.subtitle: Create a new secured record in your vault
add.placeContent: Enter your confidential data, notes, or credentials here...

details.title: Record Details
details.descPrivate: Strictly private. Only you can read this data when logged in.
details.descPublic: Publicly accessible via your Public Key. Anyone with the link can read this.
details.dangerDesc: Once you delete a record, there is no going back. Please be certain.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account credentials
profile.keyWarning: * Share this key to allow public read-only access to your specific data.

profile.descResetLink: We will send a reset link to

hero.title: Public Access Vault
hero.desc: Access unlocked data shared by users. You need the correct Username and Public Key to view the records.

status.noDataDesc: We couldn't find any public records matching your request.

messages.infoMode: Public Access Mode. Enter credentials to unlock shared records.
messages.errRequired: Both Username and Public Key are required.
messages.errMaxKey: Public Key must be max {{max}} characters.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.desc: Have a suggestion or found a bug? Let us know to help us make TextVault better.
